title: Shell Management
description: Manage custom shells with your own base images
name_hint: Unique identifier, can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
name_readonly_hint: Shell name cannot be changed after creation
base_shell_hint: The shell type this custom shell is based on (ClaudeCode, Agno)
no_shells_hint: Click the button above to create your first custom shell
validation_async_hint: Validation is running in the background. Results will be available shortly.
validation_timeout: Validation timed out, please check network or image size
delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete the shell "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.name_invalid: Shell name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.base_image_and_shell_required: Both base image and base shell are required for validation
errors.image_not_compatible: Image is not compatible with the selected shell type
errors.group_required_hint: You must select a group when creating a shell

software_requirements_hint: The following software must be pre-installed in your base image and meet minimum version requirements
